scripts.test: rm -rf .test-out && tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --outDir .test-out --lib ES2022,DOM src/sketcher.ts src/sketch_state.test.ts src/suppression.ts src/suppression.test.ts && node .test-out/sketch_state.test.js && node .test-out/suppression.test.js
